priority.full_text:
Anthropic created unnecessary drama:

– months of hype around Mythos
– launched Fable 5
– got banned
– relaunched Fable 5 with more restrictions
– extended limits
– burned more tokens

OpenAI:

– no unnecessary hype
– shipped GPT-5.6
– Sol > Fable

Be like OpenAI.
